meta.title: Control Plane
meta.description: Control surface for node orchestration, chain routing policy and certificate state.

shell.groupDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

auth.title: Sign in to the control plane
auth.description: Use the control-plane account and password to obtain the Bearer token for all protected views.
auth.rotateDescription: The default credential is admin / admin. You must change the password before entering the console for the first time.
auth.passwordRule: Password must be at least 8 characters

setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.description: Configure the MySQL database connection and JWT signing key to initialize the control plane.
setup.adminPasswordHint: Required, used for initial admin login

overview.title: Control console for node registration, chain orchestration and whitelist forwarding
overview.subtitle: Manage node enrollment, routing policy, heartbeat health and certificate state in one place.
overview.topologyHint: Built around node parent-child and relay-chain visibility
overview.healthHint: Node health, certificate renewal and path reachability in one place
overview.pathDesignerHint: Inspect parent-child links and route chain ownership
overview.queueMuted: Certificates and policy revisions stay aligned in the same surface

pages.nodesDesc: Manage node detail, parent-child relationships and relay topology.
pages.chainsDesc: Edit hop ordering, validate scopes and preview compiled chain configuration.
pages.routesDesc: Whitelist rules, match conditions and destination scopes.
pages.certificatesDesc: Let’s Encrypt and internal certificate status.

routes.chainRequired: Chain id is required for chain action
routes.destinationScopeRequired: Destination scope is required for direct action
routes.invalidDomainSuffix: Invalid domain suffix format, must start with .
routes.scopeChainMismatch: Scope does not match chain's final hop node
routes.emptyPolicies: Published policy revisions are listed here.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.emptyDetail: Registered node and panel certificates are listed here.

accounts.placeholderPasswordKeep: Leave blank to keep current password
accounts.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
accounts.emptyAccountsList: Create additional operators when you need delegated access.
accounts.emptyGroupsList: Create a group to define access scopes for accounts.

common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
common.serverDrivenDesc: Review query-driven data, task state, route editing and visual topology.

chains.listDesc: Manage relay chains and configure hop sequences
chains.editorDesc: Configure chain hops and destination scope
chains.noHops: No hops added yet. Add nodes to create a chain.
chains.emptyChains: Create relay chains before binding route rules to them.

health.certificateDesc: Track public and internal certificate pressure separately from heartbeat freshness so renewal risk remains visible.
health.emptyCertificatesDetail: Registered public and internal certificates are listed here.
health.certificateSearchPlaceholder: Search by owner, type, provider, or ID
health.noMatchingCertificatesDetail: Adjust the current search or filters to see matching certificates.
health.heartbeatDesc: Filter by derived state, inspect listener and certificate summaries, and watch policy attachment drift per node.
health.loadingNodeHealthDetail: Heartbeat and node registry data are loading.
health.emptyNodeHealthDetail: Node-agent heartbeat reports are listed here.
health.heartbeatSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, mode, scope, policy, or listener
health.noMatchingHealthDetail: Adjust the current query or filters to see matching heartbeat rows.
health.loadingHistoryDetail: Loading health history for selected node.
health.emptyHistoryDetail: No heartbeat history available for this node in the last 24 hours.
health.healthyHeartbeatsDesc: Nodes reporting normal listener and cert state.
health.staleHeartbeatsDesc: Last heartbeat older than the configured freshness window.
health.unreportedNodesDesc: Registered nodes that have never sent a heartbeat row.
health.certificatePressureDesc: Certificates marked rotate, renew-soon, failed, or otherwise non-healthy.
health.loadingDistributionDetail: Loading health data for distribution chart.
health.emptyDistributionDetail: No health data available for distribution chart.
health.historySelected: Heartbeat history for the selected node over the last 24 hours.
health.historySelectPrompt: Select a node to view its heartbeat history.
health.selectNodeTrend: Select a specific node from the dropdown above to view its 24-hour heartbeat trend.

nodesConsole.approvalsDesc: Review and approve pending node enrollment requests created via bootstrap tokens.
nodesConsole.emptyPending: No pending enrollment requests. Create a bootstrap token to start.
nodesConsole.bootstrapDesc: Issue a one-time token for remote self-enroll flows.
nodesConsole.quickConnectDesc: Connect a running node directly with ip:port and join password.
nodesConsole.manualDesc: Create node metadata records for runtimes that are not online yet.
nodesConsole.registryDesc: Query registered nodes, inspect derived health and policy attachment, and maintain records with read, update, and delete actions.
nodesConsole.healthyNodesDesc: Nodes with recent heartbeat and no degraded signal.
nodesConsole.degradedNodesDesc: Nodes reporting non-healthy listener or certificate state.
nodesConsole.staleNodesDesc: Nodes whose heartbeat freshness window has already expired.
nodesConsole.unreportedNodesDesc: Registered nodes without any heartbeat record yet.
nodesConsole.emptyRegistry: Create or connect the first node to populate the registry.
nodesConsole.registrySearchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, scope, parent, or host
nodesConsole.noMatchingNodesDetail: Adjust the current query or filters to see matching nodes.
nodesConsole.editNodeDesc: Update metadata, exposure, and runtime state for the selected node.
nodesConsole.topologyDesc: Inspect parent-child links together with live transport state to verify a -> b -> c tunnel overlays.
nodesConsole.publicTransportsDesc: Directly reachable node entrypoints synthesized from public endpoint records.
nodesConsole.reverseTunnelsUpDesc: Parent-child reverse_ws_parent sessions currently reporting connected.
nodesConsole.reverseTunnelsBlockedDesc: Configured reverse tunnels that are not currently connected.
nodesConsole.emptyTopology: Parent-child and relay trust links are listed here.
nodesConsole.noRuntimeTransports: No runtime transports have been reported yet.
nodesConsole.defaultPasswordHint: If the node started without NODE_JOIN_PASSWORD, enter password above and set the replacement password here.

quickConnect.newJoinPasswordHint: required when node still uses default password
quickConnect.name: Name
quickConnect.nodeDefaultPasswordHint: Nodes started without `NODE_JOIN_PASSWORD` now default to `password` and must rotate it during first panel connect.

manual.name: Name
manual.portValidation: Public port must be greater than 0
manual.manualHint: Use this when you want IDs and topology records ready before the node comes online.

edge.label: Edge public entry
edge.hint: The first reachable node for users, usually with a public endpoint and used as the first hop.

relay.label: Relay private downstream
relay.hint: A user LAN, VPN-side, or transit node that usually sits behind an edge node.

bootstrap.scopeKeyHint: Use the same scope for nodes that belong to the same reachable group.
bootstrap.parentNodeIdHint: Relay nodes usually choose their edge parent. Edge nodes usually leave this empty.
bootstrap.parentReachableUrlRequired: Parent reachable URL is required for relay nodes
bootstrap.parentReachableUrlHint: Address that the child node can use to reach its upstream parent.
bootstrap.publicHostHint: Recommended for edge nodes. Usually empty for relay or user-LAN nodes.
bootstrap.publicPortHint: Leave empty to use the node listener default. Only public entries usually need this.
bootstrap.publicPortInvalid: Port must be a positive integer
bootstrap.targetNodeIdHint: Leave blank for a brand new node, or bind this token to a manually created record.
bootstrap.tokenShownOnce: Token is shown once in this page state. Generate a new one if the machine was not enrolled.
bootstrap.dockerScopeHint: Node name, type, scope, upstream and public endpoint metadata are stored in the bootstrap token. The target machine only needs the control-plane URL and token.
bootstrap.generateOnDemand: Generate on demand. Token content is only kept in current page state.
bootstrap.nodeNameDuplicate: A node with this name already exists
bootstrap.bootstrapHint: Remote node self-enroll flow for machines not directly reachable from the panel.
